policy.artifact_policy: Original PDFs are stored externally. Raw datasets, WAV files, NumPy arrays, model weights, generated indexes, and generated scientific artifacts must not be committed to Git.

sources.title: Improving Fan System Performance: A Sourcebook for Industry
sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Energy, Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy, Industrial Technologies Program
sources.scope: Fan maintenance, vibration monitoring, records, fan/motor assembly problems, belt drives, noise and vibration indicators.
source_sections: Section 2 fact sheet 4 - Common Fan Systems Problems
Section 2 fact sheet 5 - Indications of Oversized Fans
limitations: No RUL or fault probability support

sources.title: Operations & Maintenance Best Practices - A Guide to Achieving Operational Efficiency Release 3.0
sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Energy Federal Energy Management Program / Pacific Northwest National Laboratory
sources.document_type: DOE/FEMP operations and maintenance best-practices guide
sources.scope: O&M maintenance program context, predictive maintenance context, air-handling checklist, fan checklist.
